title: Change red muted text to silver

requirements.text: Change the --text-muted CSS custom property from red back to silver in both light and dark theme modes in frontend/src/index.css

quotes: lets change the smaller text in red to silver

acceptanceCriteria: The --text-muted variable in light mode uses a silver/gray color value
The --text-muted variable in dark mode uses a silver/gray color value
Smaller text elements that use the muted text color appear in silver instead of red

nonGoals: Modifying the primary red or gold brand colors
